script_text: Two fact books can be about the same topic.
But each author picks different details.
Reading both gives you a bigger picture.
Look for what both books agree on.
Those are the main points everyone knows.
Then look for what is special in each one.
One might share more pictures. The other more stories.
Both add to what you know!
Make a two-column chart. Same on one, different on the other.
Now you are ready to compare two fact books!
